title: CostAttestationV1 (v1)
description: An issuer-signed declaration of the cost of one execution, in integer nano-USD against a named rate table, referencing an ExecutionReceipt by id + digest. Separate from the receipt by design (cost is a declaration, not the receipt's proof); supersedable via new attestation_id. Canonicalization: JCS (RFC 8785). Signature: Ed25519 over canonicalJson(body minus signature), base64url. See spec/settlement-invoice-v1.md §3.

schema.description: This artifact's type tag (in-body domain separation).

attestation_id.description: UUIDv7. A supersession is a NEW id (spec §3.3).

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm — the role, never baked into a field name.

value.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the JCS canonicalization of the full signed artifact.

receipt_digest.description: `executionReceiptDigest(receipt)` over the full signed ExecutionReceipt — binds the cost to the exact receipt.

cost_nanos.description: The cost, in integer nano-USD (1 USD = 1e9 nano). Positive.

rate_table_id.description: The versioned rate table the cost was computed under (e.g. `agency-rates-v1`).

covers.description: Issuer-owned label for what the cost accounts for (rate-table basis). Opaque to motebit.

issuer_public_key.description: Issuer Ed25519 public key, hex (64 lowercase). OPTIONAL; verify against the REGISTERED key.

attested_at.description: ms epoch. MUST be >= the receipt's `completed_at` — a cost can't be attested before the work finished.

suite.description: Cryptosuite: JCS (RFC 8785), Ed25519, base64url signature, hex public keys.

signature.description: Base64url Ed25519 over `canonicalJson(body minus signature)`. Verify with the registered issuer key.
